fault_hypothesis: On line 68, the filter uses `t >= cutoff` (inclusive) instead of `t > cutoff` (exclusive), so events exactly at the cutoff boundary are incorrectly retained.

spec.expr: all(t > cutoff__1 for t in [t for t in timestamps if t >= cutoff__1])

constraints.intent: Every timestamp in the result must be strictly greater than the cutoff, not equal to it.
Verify the cutoff is computed correctly as now minus window.
All returned timestamps must be strictly after the cutoff (now - window), excluding the boundary.
Confirm cutoff value is correct before it is used in the list comprehension filter.
